title: getapihealthreturnsservicestatus
description: Verify GET /api/health returns 200 with service status, timestamp, and service name when service is healthy.

title: postclerkwebhookprocessesvalidusercreatedevent
description: Verify POST /clerk-webhook with valid Svix headers and signed user.created event returns 200 and syncs user record.

title: postclerkwebhookrejectsinvalidsignature
description: Verify POST /clerk-webhook without Svix headers or with invalid signature returns 400 error.

title: postclerkwebhookreturns500ifsecretnotset
description: Verify POST /clerk-webhook returns 500 error if webhook secret is not configured.

title: mutationorganizationscreatecreatesneworganization
description: Verify organizations.create mutation with valid name creates organization and returns new organization ID.

title: mutationorganizationsupdateupdatesorgnamebyowner
description: Verify organizations.update mutation updates organization name when performed by OWNER role and changes are reflected in organizations.listMine.

title: mutationorganizationsupdatedeniesnonowner
description: Verify organizations.update mutation returns authorization error and does not update organization when performed by non-owner.

title: querymembershipslistreturnsorganizationmembers
description: Verify memberships.list query returns all members of an organization with user and role data for authenticated user.

title: mutationmembershipsaddaddsoreinvitesuserbyemail
description: Verify memberships.add mutation adds existing user to organization or creates invitation for unknown user email, returning status 'added' or 'invited'.

title: mutationmembershipsaddrejectsduplicatependinginvitation
description: Verify memberships.add mutation returns error when adding an email that already has a pending invitation.
